nasb.text: In His days Judah will be saved, And Israel will dwell securely; And this is His name by which He will be called, ‘The Lord our righteousness.’

esv.text: In his days Judah will be saved, and Israel will dwell securely. And this is the name by which he will be called: ‘The Lord is our righteousness.’

cnv.text: 在他執政的日子，猶大必得救， 以色列也必安然居住。 人要稱他的名字為‘耶和華我們的義’。”

ccb.text: 在他掌权的日子，犹大必得拯救，以色列必国泰民安。他将被称为‘耶和华是我们的公义’。”
